title: Product CRUD (images, status, availability, featured)
description: Admin product create/update/delete with image upload to Vercel Blob, active/inactive status, availability flag (no stock quantity), and featured-product selection.

inScope: Product create/update/delete with Vercel Blob image upload
Availability flag (available/unavailable) — no stock quantity tracking
outOfScope: Stock/inventory quantity tracking (explicitly dropped by client)

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can create a product with images, price (integer cents), category, and brand
Admin can edit and soft-delete a product
Admin can toggle a product's active/inactive and availability flags
Admin can mark a product as featured
